name: map
title: Map
description: A MapLibre-powered map component with markers, popups, tooltips, routes, and controls.

components.title: Controls
components.description: Zoom, geolocate, fullscreen, and compass controls.

components.title: Markers
components.description: Map markers with labels, tooltips, and popup composition.

components.title: Routes
components.description: Line routes with optional markers and interaction handlers.

components.title: GeoJSON
components.description: GeoJSON sources and layers for custom map data.

components.title: Clusters
components.description: Clustered point layers for dense datasets.
